---
pagetitle: "Ilha Byrne"
description: "I am a zoologist, evolutionary biologist and science communicator, and a PhD candidate at the University of Queensland researching coral population and conservation genomics."
page-layout: full
toc: false
anchor-sections: false
---

```{=html}
<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-inner">
    <div class="hero-name">Ilha Byrne</div>
    <p class="tagline">Zoologist <span>·</span> Evolutionary biologist <span>·</span> Science communicator</p>
    <p class="lead-intro">I study how genetic diversity and adaptation shape marine invertebrates, from corals on the Great Barrier Reef to the DNA drifting in seawater.</p>
    <div class="hero-social">
      <a href="mailto:ilhabyrne@gmail.com" aria-label="Email"><i class="bi bi-envelope-fill"></i></a>
      <a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0003-3909-2902" target="_blank" aria-label="ORCID"><i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i></a>
      <a href="https://github.com/ilhabyrne" target="_blank" aria-label="GitHub"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>
      <a href="https://www.instagram.com/biologist.byrne" target="_blank" aria-label="Instagram"><i class="bi bi-instagram"></i></a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<nav class="circle-nav" aria-label="Site sections">
  <a class="circle-tab" href="about.html"><span class="circle"><i class="bi bi-person-circle"></i></span><span class="label">About</span></a>
  <a class="circle-tab" href="research.html"><span class="circle"><i class="bi bi-diagram-3-fill"></i></span><span class="label">Research</span></a>
  <a class="circle-tab" href="publications.html"><span class="circle"><i class="bi bi-journal-text"></i></span><span class="label">Publications &amp; Talks</span></a>
  <a class="circle-tab" href="outreach.html"><span class="circle"><i class="bi bi-people-fill"></i></span><span class="label">Teaching &amp; Outreach</span></a>
  <a class="circle-tab" href="photography.html"><span class="circle"><i class="bi bi-camera-fill"></i></span><span class="label">Photography</span></a>
  <a class="circle-tab" href="cv.html"><span class="circle"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-person-fill"></i></span><span class="label">CV &amp; Contact</span></a>
</nav>
```
